creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text: I've started taking a look at it; I've managed to get the plist to work with by passing PYTHON_MAJOR_VER to PLIST_SUB, but I'm currently blocked by PYTHON_PY3K_PLIST_HACK (to take __pycache__/ directories into account if Python>=3.2 is used) not considering @dirrmtry: https://phabric.freebsd.org/D191
